response.justification: Candidate has ~19 years of broad software engineering experience across web, mobile, embedded and backend, which technically clears the 15-year bar. However, this role is a Director-level IC focused on AI strategy, recognized AI expertise, and cloud platform direction — and the resume shows mostly Senior/Staff-level individual contributor work with only a few months of recent AI-adjacent exposure (MCP tooling at re:cinq starting April 2025). There is no evidence of recognized AI expertise, AI products at scale, executive-level technical influence, or deep cloud platform strategy work expected at the Principal/Director IC tier.
strengths: Long, polyglot engineering career spanning web, mobile, embedded, and high-throughput backend systems
Founder of GISCollective open-source platform — some entrepreneurial and product-ownership signal
Active community presence through workshops, talks, and OSS libraries (Fluent-Asserts, Trial, Vibe.dav)
concerns: No recognized AI expertise or shipped AI products/platforms; AI work began only in April 2025
Career level is Senior/Staff IC, not Principal/Director — no evidence of org-wide technical leadership or strategy influence
Limited cloud platform depth (brief AWS CDK exposure) and no advanced degree in an AI-related field

key_factors.factor: Lack of recognized AI expertise and AI product portfolio
Seniority gap vs. Director-level IC expectations
Breadth of engineering experience across stacks and domains
